vertical: Premium Real Estate — HNI & NRI Buyer Leads
offering: SN Realtors is a premium real estate brokerage LLP in Bangalore. They channel-partner with top developers (Prestige, Sobha, Brigade, Godrej, etc.) and earn commission by placing HNI and NRI buyers into high-value residential projects — luxury apartments, villas, and penthouses typically in the INR 1.5–10 Cr+ range across Bangalore (Whitefield, Sarjapur, Hebbal, North Bangalore, Electronic City, etc.). We need leads who are actively looking to BUY premium property in Bangalore, plus the referral channels that have direct access to such buyers.
target_industries: Wealth management and private banking teams serving HNI real estate clients
NRI banking and remittance relationship teams
Family offices and investment advisors with real estate allocation
Premium real estate consultants and channel partners (non-competing)
Corporate relocation and expat housing consultants
Chartered accountants and tax advisors serving HNI property buyers
Interior designers and architects working on new luxury home projects
Premium club memberships and HNI networking communities
Alumni and professional networks with high-earning Bangalore members
HNI individuals and families buying premium residential property in Bangalore
NRIs investing in or relocating to Bangalore luxury homes
Startup founders and CXOs upgrading to premium apartments or villas
Senior tech professionals and recently promoted executives house-hunting
People selling existing property to upgrade to premium segment
NRI returnees and Bangalore relocators from other metros

scoring_guidance: This is PREMIUM REAL ESTATE BUYER INTENT for SN Realtors (brokerage placing HNI/NRI buyers into developer projects like Prestige/Sobha), NOT B2B software and NOT job-hiring signals. A strong lead is (a) a referral channel with DIRECT ACCESS to HNI/NRI buyers (wealth managers, private/NRI bankers, family offices, premium property consultants, relocation desks, CAs, interior designers, HNI clubs), OR (b) a NAMED HNI individual, NRI, founder, CXO, or senior professional actively looking to BUY premium residential property in Bangalore (INR 1.5 Cr+). fit_score = how closely the lead matches a buyer of premium Bangalore property OR a channel that reaches HNI/NRI home buyers. trigger_score = strength of buying intent or buyer access (public posts asking where to buy, NRI investment enquiries, relocation, upgrade from existing home, site-visit interest, wealth-advisor client demand) — NOT hiring or vendor procurement. reachability_score = THIS IS CRITICAL: score high ONLY when there is a named person, firm, advisor, or organization with a discoverable public contact (website, LinkedIn profile, business listing). Anonymous one-off forum/Reddit posters with no identity, no firm, and no way to contact them should score LOW on reachability even if intent is high — the sales team must be able to actually call/email the lead. Prefer referral channels and named professionals (which enrich reliably into name + email + phone) over un-contactable anonymous buyers. intent_recency_score = how recent the demand/post/activity is. pain_point = the buyer's real need (right premium project, trusted broker, NRI compliance, location fit, developer credibility, investment upside). Be GENEROUS on surfacing plausible leads, but make CONTACTABILITY a top ranking factor so the output is full of leads the team can actually reach.
